blocks.text: Bernabéu night — Bayern face Real Madrid in the quarter-final clash of the season
Arsenal lead the Premier League by 9 points and arrive in Lisbon with a double in their sights. A first-leg result away from the Emirates could define their entire season.

blocks.label: ⚽ CL Quarter-Finals — Wednesday
items: Barcelona vs Atlético Madrid, 21:00 — Camp Nou derby, La Liga's top two collide
PSG vs Liverpool, 21:00 — Parc des Princes blockbuster

blocks.text: ⛳ Thu 06:00 — Masters Tournament begins. Hovland & Reitan chase Augusta glory
